description: Style NoteIn earthy tones, coolers comes up with this sharp pair of sandals for a great look this spring. Sandals needn't necessarily tone down your casual ensemble - this pair is the right choice to perfectly offset your summer look. Style this with fitted trousers or cargo shorts for maximum impact.Product DetailsLight brown round toed sandals with forefoot and midfoot straps and a toe separatorSoft, padded footbed with stitch detail and branding printUpper adhered to the rubber outsole, upraised at the heel with diamond-patterns all overMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirt
